issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
subject: Subscription pause
response: Hi! If your account meets the eligibility requirements, you can pause an individual self-serve monthly subscription instead of canceling it. To do this, go to your profile icon, open Settings, then Billing under Subscription, click Cancel Plan, choose the Pause Subscription prompt, select a pause duration from 1 to 12 months, and confirm. Please note that the subscription must be active and started at least 30 days ago, and this applies to the Individual Monthly - Basic or Interview Monthly plans.
justification: The answer is covered by "Pause Subscription," which explains the eligibility requirements and the exact steps to pause a subscription. The ticket is about pausing a subscription, so the best product area is settings.

issue: How do I dispute a charge
subject: Dispute charge
response: Hello! To dispute a charge, the cardholder contacts their issuer to question the charge on the billing statement. The issuer then contacts you through your acquirer for an accurate copy of the transaction record, and you should promptly fax or mail a clear, legible copy back to keep the process moving. If you're trying to avoid future disputes, make sure your return, refund, and cancellation policies are clearly stated at the time of transaction and on the sales receipt.
justification: The answer is supported by "Dispute Resolution," which explains the dispute process and the steps for responding to a dispute. The same title also provides guidance on avoiding disputes by clearly stating return, refund, and cancellation policies.

issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
subject: Website Data crawl
response: Hello! If you want to stop Anthropic from crawling your website, you can block the crawler by updating your site’s robots.txt file. To block it across your entire website, add `User-agent: ClaudeBot` followed by `Disallow: /` in the top-level robots.txt file, and repeat this for each subdomain you want to opt out from. If you only want to limit crawling rather than fully block it, you can also use the non-standard `Crawl-delay` extension in robots.txt, for example `User-agent: ClaudeBot` and `Crawl-delay: 1`.
justification: The article "Does Anthropic crawl data from the web, and how can site owners block the crawler?" gives the exact robots.txt instructions for blocking ClaudeBot and limiting crawl activity. This fully answers the site-owner opt-out question.

issue: I am allowing Claude to use my data to improve the models, how long will the data be used for?
subject: Personal Data Use
response: Hi! If you allow Claude to use your chats or coding sessions to help improve Claude, the data may still be stored securely for up to two years. If you leave the program, previously provided data will still be stored for up to 2 years. You can also adjust your privacy settings at any time, and incognito chats are not used to improve Claude even if Model Improvement is enabled.
justification: The answer is covered by "I would like to input sensitive data into my chats with Claude. Who can view my conversations?" and "About the Development Partner Program." The first explains privacy protections and that you can adjust settings; the second states data is stored securely for up to two years and remains stored for up to 2 years after leaving the program.

issue: i am a professor in a college and wanted to setup a claude lti key for my students
subject: Claude for students
response: Hello! If you’re a professor at a college and want to set up a Claude LTI key for your students, the Canvas setup steps are available for Claude for Education administrators and LMS administrators. In Canvas, sign in as an administrator, go to Admin -> Developer Keys, create a new LTI key, and use the Claude LTI values for Redirect URIs, Target Link URI, OpenID Connect Initiation Url, and JWK method. Then install the app in Canvas under Admin -> Settings -> Apps by choosing Configuration Type “By Client ID,” and finally enable Canvas in Claude for Education under Organization settings > Connectors and enter the Canvas Domain and Client ID.
justification: The article "Set up the Claude LTI in Canvas by Instructure" provides the exact Canvas and Claude for Education administrator steps needed to create and enable a Claude LTI integration. The ticket asks about setting up a Claude LTI key for students, which matches this setup guidance.
